Hand #47: Phil Hellmuth raised to 120,000 from the cutoff. Daniel Negreanu called from the big blind. The flop came Ks 9h 4d. Negreanu checked, Hellmuth bet 150,000, Negreanu folded.

Hand #48: Mike Matusow raised to 100,000 from the button. Everyone folded.

Hand #49: Phil Hellmuth limped from the small blind. Tom Dwan checked his option in the big blind. The flop was Ah 7c 2s. Hellmuth bet 60,000, Dwan raised to 180,000, Hellmuth called. The turn was the Jd. Both players checked. The river was the 3h. Hellmuth checked, Dwan bet 300,000, Hellmuth folded.

Chip counts after the break: Phil Hellmuth 2,450,000; Daniel Negreanu 3,100,000.
